text: Drove the Hwy 71 frontage between Bastrop and Cedar Creek again this morning. Three new pad sites staked since spring. The rooftops haven't caught up yet, but the dirt work tells you where this is going.
Reminder for landowners sitting on ag-exempt tracts near a growth corridor: the exemption is a holding strategy, not an exit strategy. Know your rollback exposure before you ever entertain an offer.

Spent the afternoon walking a 40-acre tract off SH 130. Great frontage, but the floodplain runs right through the buildable third. On paper it penciled. On the ground it's a different deal. Always walk the dirt.
